overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Silent Hill 2 showing protagonist James walking along a foggy lakeside path past an industrial brick warehouse, then onto a long concrete pier extending into Toluca Lake. The atmosphere is heavy with dense fog, creating low visibility and a desaturated, eerie mood typical of the survival horror genre.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy lakeside walkway beside industrial warehouse

events.description: character glances down toward the water while walking
location text 'Toluca Lake' appears on screen indicating the area name

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the foggy path beside the warehouse, occasionally looking around at the desolate surroundings

entered.detail: two-story industrial brick building with metal awnings, barred windows, and rooftop antennas
black metal safety railing running along the building edge
calm water surface completely obscured by heavy gray fog
short weathered wooden posts along the water edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with James walking along a narrow concrete path between a foggy lake and a large brick industrial warehouse. The atmosphere is thick with fog, limiting visibility. The camera follows from behind as he walks steadily, occasionally glancing around the desolate environment. Location text identifies the area as Toluca Lake.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial dock area with large cable spool and metal fencing

events.description: passing the corner of the warehouse into the open dock area
walking past large industrial cable spool with red paint markings on the dock

agents.ego_description: continuing past the warehouse corner through the open dock area, navigating around industrial debris and equipment

entered.detail: large wooden industrial cable reel with distinctive red painted markings on top
tall metal gate and fencing structure blocking part of the dock area
stack of weathered wooden pallets sitting on the concrete dock

segments.scene_description: Leaving the warehouse wall behind, the scene opens into a wider dock area. James walks past industrial debris including a large cable spool with red markings and stacks of wooden pallets. A metal chain-link fence and gate structure stands ahead as the building recedes into the foggy background to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow concrete pier extending into foggy lake

events.description: stepping onto the narrow pier extending into the lake, water visible on both sides

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the long narrow pier into the dense fog, surrounded by water on both sides with limited visibility ahead

entered.detail: long narrow concrete walkway extending straight into the dense fog with metal bollards on both sides
rusted metal posts with chain connections lining both edges of the pier

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows James walking onto a long, narrow concrete pier that extends deep into Toluca Lake. The warehouse and dock structures fall away behind him, leaving only the fog-shrouded water visible on both sides. Metal bollards line the pier edges as he walks steadily into the white void, the path ahead disappearing into the dense fog.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic industrial lakeside path into a desolate, open pier stretching into a white void. It begins with James walking along a narrow concrete path flanked by a large brick warehouse and the foggy shores of Toluca Lake. As he leaves the warehouse wall behind, the environment opens into a wider dock area filled with industrial debris, including a red-marked cable spool and wooden pallets. The scene then shifts as James passes through a chain-link gate, leaving the buildings to recede into the background. Finally, the camera follows him onto a long, narrow concrete pier lined with metal bollards, where the land disappears and he walks steadily into the dense, all-encompassing fog of the lake.
